# Yuem

> Yuem is a public media feed for discovering, reading, and sharing image, video, and article posts.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://xse.yuelk.com/): Public feed and main entry point.
- [Explore](https://xse.yuelk.com/explore): Browse public posts and discovery content.
- [Download](https://xse.yuelk.com/download): Official app download page.

## Public Content

- [Public post pages](https://xse.yuelk.com/post?id=1885): Public posts use canonical URLs in the form `https://xse.yuelk.com/post?id={post_id}`.

## Machine-Readable Resources

- [Sitemap](https://xse.yuelk.com/sitemap.xml): Index of public pages intended for crawling.
- [Robots policy](https://xse.yuelk.com/robots.txt): Search crawler access policy.

## Access Notes

- Public feed, explore, download, and public post pages are intended for indexing.
- Account, wallet, messages, notifications, settings, admin, and publish pages require user context and are not intended for public crawling.
